betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Weaponry: Lepton Cannon§f

§aThe Lepton Cannon is a QMD endgame weapon that fires charged lepton particles.§f
The §bLepton Cannon§f (`qmd:lepton_cannon`) is one of three QMD endgame weapons (alongside the §bGluon Gun§f and §bAntimatter Launcher§f). It is a player-held ranged weapon that fires lepton particles — electrons, muons, or tau particles — and applies radiation effects to the target.

§6Crafting Recipe (graph: minecraft.crafting)§f:
Per the JEI graph, the Lepton Cannon recipe requires:
- §bElite Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:6`)
- §bElite Plating§f (`nuclearcraft:part:3`)
- §bSuper Alloy Ingot§f (`qmd:ingot_alloy:6`)
- §bExtreme Alloy Ingot§f (`nuclearcraft:alloy:10`)
- §bBSCCO Wire§f (`qmd:part:4`)
- Other accelerator-class components

§6How to Use§f:
- §bRight-click§f to fire a lepton particle projectile at the targeted mob or block.
- The Lepton Cannon consumes a §b§cfuel cell§f§f (likely a §b§cpositron cell§f§f or §b§cmuonium cell§f§f) for operation. The exact fuel type is hinted at in-game — check the §b§cLepton Cannon§f§f tooltip.
- Projectiles travel in a §b§cparticle beam§f§f and apply radiation damage on hit.

§6Damage Type§f:
- The Lepton Cannon deals §b§chigh burst damage§f§f (heavy damage, multiplied by §b§cparticle charge§f§f).
- Mobs hit are §b§cradioactively poisoned§f§f — they take §b§cradiation damage§f§f over time.
- The Lepton Cannon is a §b§cmid-tier§f§f damage weapon in the QMD endgame trio.

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bElite Processor§f → from §bAdvanced Processor§f + §bBSCCO Wire§f + Hafnium + Platinum (QMDRecipes.java:505)
- §bElite Plating§f → from §bNC Manufactory§f
- §bSuper Alloy Ingot§f → from §bNC Alloy Furnace§f
- §bExtreme Alloy Ingot§f → end-game alloy from §bHBM NTM Alloy Furnace§f
- §bBSCCO Wire§f → from §bBSCCO Dust§f + Silver in HBM Assembly Machine

§cWarning§f: Do not use the Lepton Cannon on antimatter cells — the lepton burst can trigger a detonation.

§eTip§f: The Lepton Cannon has the §b§cmedium§f§f damage profile of the three QMD weapons — the §bGluon Gun§f deals §b§cmoderate§f§f, the §bAntimatter Launcher§f deals §b§chighest damage§f§f, and the Lepton Cannon is in between.
